title: TS Better Boss Fighting
description: TSmod is a GPL v3 licensed balance mod that ensures pure and fair Minecraft Boss fights by implementing participant-death healing and suppressing surrounding mob spawns.
body:
# TSmod (TS-BBF)

**TSmod** is a balancing mod for Minecraft Forge designed to elevate the challenge and fairness of Boss encounters. It prevents "zerg tactics" (overwhelming bosses with numbers) and ensures a focused combat environment by eliminating interference from surrounding mobs and introducing a high-stakes respawn mechanic.

## 🌟 Core Features
### 1. Dynamic Combat Tracking
Automatically identifies Boss encounters and tracks all participants, including players and their summoned minions. This ensures the mod knows exactly who is part of the "raid."

### 2. Death Penalty Healing
When a participant falls, the Boss recovers health based on the "weight" of the deceased:

> - **Players:** 1.0 weight (High impact)
> 
> - **Minions:** 0.1 weight (Prevents minion spamming as a meat shield)

### 3. Battlefield Purification
During combat, the mod suppresses natural mob spawns and monster spawner activity within the vicinity, ensuring the integrity of the duel.

### 4. Campfire Respawn System
A tactical, temporary respawn mechanism for front-line operations:

> - **Temporary Binding:** Right-click a lit campfire to set a temporary spawn point. If the campfire is extinguished or broken, you revert to your original bed/spawn.
> 
> - **Purge Shockwave:** Upon respawning, the campfire releases a physical pulse that repels and teleports all nearby hostile mobs (non-bosses) outside a 16-block radius.
> 
> - **Vulnerability & Recovery:** Players respawn with only 1 Health (Half a heart) but gain Regeneration II while standing within 8 blocks of the campfire.
> 
> - **Spatial Cooldown:** Campfires require 60s to stabilize after being placed or ignited. Triggering a shockwave puts all campfires within 24 blocks on shared cooldown.
> 
> - **Boss Suppression:** If a Boss is within the campfire's radius during respawn, the campfire is instantly extinguished by the Boss's aura, and the player is sent back to their original spawn point.

> - **Special Weapon:** Maybe it needs some fresh blood...

## 🛠️ Configuration
TSmod is highly customizable via tsm-common.toml. You can adjust:

- **Healing Ratios:** Fine-tune how much Bosses heal upon player/minion death.

- **Detection Radii:** Set the range for boss tracking and mob suppression.

- **Campfire Mechanics:** Adjust purge radius, cooldown durations, and regeneration range ect.

## 📄 License & Attribution
- **License:** GNU General Public License v3 (GPL v3).

- **Copyright:** (C) 2026 **TerrySet**. All original source artifacts are the property of the author.

- **Status:** Provided "AS IS" without warranty of any kind.
